subject: [PATCH v2 3/4] nfsd: implement server-stats-get netlink handler

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a netlink handler to expose NFS server statistics, allowing them to be retrieved via the generic netlink family. The handler streams statistics across multiple messages, first sending scalar stats and then per-operation counts for NFSv4 procedures. This allows the nfsstat tool to retrieve server statistics using netlink, with a procfs fallback for older kernels.
